claim: No Stable, release, conformance, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: Editable values are native radio inputs in a fieldset with a visible legend. Read-only values are labelled text with decorative stars.
semantics.naming: The legend names the editable group. Every radio has a locale-formatted value/max accessible label. Provider and formatter outputs must be non-empty and no longer than 256 Unicode code points. Read-only value text follows the visible label in DOM order.
semantics.roleOverride: Consumer role overrides and interactive render replacements are outside the supported contract.

interaction.keyboard: Tab enters the native radio group; Arrow keys move and select with spatial RTL behavior; Home and End select the first and last enabled choices; Space uses native activation.
interaction.pointer: Each radio label is the complete pointer target and activation occurs on click rather than pointer down.
interaction.touch: Every choice preserves a minimum 44 CSS pixel target and no gesture is required.
interaction.speech: Locale-formatted value labels and the explicit clear label are available for voice targeting.
interaction.switchAccess: Native radios expose one group of reachable choices without duplicate interactive stars.

formBehavior: Editable radios submit the selected canonical integer, or an empty string for the explicit clear choice. Native reset restores an uncontrolled default. Disabled controls are omitted. A named read-only value uses one successful hidden input.

states.synchronization: Checked radio, star fill, check mark, callback value, submitted value, invalid relationship, and read-only text derive from one controlled or uncontrolled value.

preferences.enhancedContrast: Uses text, native checked state, a check mark, and boundary geometry in addition to color.
preferences.forcedColors: Uses Canvas, CanvasText, and Highlight while retaining a check mark and exact value text.
preferences.reducedMotion: No value, focus, or state transition depends on motion.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Radio targets wrap intrinsically; the explicit clear target occupies its own row on narrow canvases.

internationalization.imePolicy: The component contains no free-form text editing path.
internationalization.serialization: Labels use Intl.NumberFormat; editable and read-only form values remain canonical ASCII numbers.

consumerResponsibilities: Provide a concise visible group label and meaningful error or instruction text.
Translate dynamic option and value messages through provider messages or formatting callbacks.
Do not combine allowClear with required; the component rejects that ambiguous native constraint.
Use read-only for displayed values that still belong to a form and plain text when no field relationship remains useful.
limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include immutable generated artifacts, packed-consumer evidence, package/source parity, or current manual assistive-technology sessions.
The editable control intentionally supports whole-star choices only; fractional ratings are an exact non-interactive read-only presentation.
